---
# Core metadata used on the title page (see titlepage.qmd)
title: "Test"
subtitle: "[Subtitle]"
author: "[Name, highest academic degree]"

# Printed as the last line on the title page (e.g., "Bern, 17 February 2026")
date: "[City, Date]"

work-type: "Master-Thesis"
requirements: "Fulfilment of the requirements for the Master of Science (MSc) in Physiotherapy"
matriculation-number: "[XX-XXX-XXX]"
institution: "Bern University of Applied Sciences, School of Health Professions"
program: "Master of Science (MSc) in Physiotherapy"
class: "[Class (e.g. 2019)]"

# Tip: for multiple advisors, use a YAML block scalar:
# advisor: |
#   Name 1, degree
#   Name 2, degree
advisor: "[Name, highest academic degree]"

format:
  docx:
    reference-doc: bfh-reference.docx
    title-block: false
    include-before-body: titlepage.qmd
    toc: true
    toc-title: "Table of Contents"
    number-sections: true

crossref:
  fig-title: "Figure"
  tbl-title: "Table"

bibliography: references.bib
csl: apa.csl
---

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| output: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| label: "Packages"
library(here)
```


# Heading 1

## Heading 1.1

### Heading 1.1.1
This is a test.

# LaTeX formula

$$ Y_{it} = \mu_t + \alpha \left(Y_{i,t-1} - \mu_{t-1}\right) + \gamma \, PA^{W}_{i,t-1} + \varepsilon_{it}, \qquad
E(\varepsilon_{it} \mid Y_{i,t-1}) = 0. $$
